tracks.title: Bleed
tracks.reason: The kick drum MIDI is the canonical example of a relentless, complex polyrhythmic pattern against a 4/4 pulse, establishing the required density and machine-like precision.

tracks.title: Pursuit
tracks.reason: The main arpeggio's MIDI provides a perfect template for the Interrogator Bass: a simple, monophonic, and aggressive sequence that drives the track through sheer force of repetition and timbre.

tracks.title: STONEFIST
tracks.reason: The main drum groove's MIDI is a target for the relationship between the kick and other percussive elements—how to create a powerful industrial bounce with relatively few elements.
